label: Student
persona_style: Encouraging, educational, clear. Explain concepts thoroughly. Use examples. Help build understanding, not just give answers. Suggest study strategies.

starter_notes.title: Getting Started with Kronus
starter_notes.content:
# Getting Started with Kronus for Studying

Kronus is your AI study partner. It explains concepts, helps with assignments, organizes your notes, and tracks your courses.

## What to try first

- Explain: "Explain [concept] in simple terms with examples"
- Study: "Create flashcards for [topic]"
- Organize: "Help me organize my notes for [course]"
- Write: "Help me outline my essay on [topic]"

## Tips

- Ask it to explain things in different ways until it clicks
- Use it to check your understanding: "Am I right that [explanation]?"
- Have it quiz you before exams

## Related

- [[course-tracker]] — Track your courses
- [[study-methods]] — Study strategies that work

starter_notes.title: Study Methods
starter_notes.content:
# Study Methods

Strategies that work for you. Kronus can help with all of these.

## Active Recall
Ask Kronus: "Quiz me on [topic]" or "Create practice questions for [chapter]"

## Spaced Repetition
Ask Kronus: "Create a review schedule for my [exam] on [date]"

## Note Summarization
Ask Kronus: "Summarize my notes on [topic] into key points"

## Related

- [[getting-started]] — Getting started guide
- [[course-tracker]] — Course tracking
